subcodes.first_line: God testifieth, by His Own Self unto His Own Self, from the Throne of His might and sovereignty, that there is none other God but Him, the Almighty, the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله لذاته بذاته فی عرش عزه و سلطانه بانه لا اله الا هو العزیز الغالب
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @call to action, @station of the Manifestation of God, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment
